task_updates.executor_notes: Created src/tools/video-editor/types/history.ts. Verified UndoSnapshot stores only {config: TimelineConfig, signature: string}; UndoEntry adds timestamp with optional label and transactionId; CheckpointTriggerType is limited to the four required values; and Checkpoint includes id, timelineId, config, createdAt, triggerType, label, and editsSinceLastCheckpoint.

Created supabase/migrations/20260326100500_create_timeline_checkpoints.sql. Verified the table includes the public.timelines FK with ON DELETE CASCADE, auth.users FK for user_id, trigger_type CHECK constraint covering the four allowed values, a composite index on (timeline_id, created_at DESC), and RLS policies enforcing auth.uid() = user_id for select/insert/update/delete.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed UndoSnapshot is limited to config and signature, and Checkpoint contains all required checkpoint fields.
Confirmed the migration includes the cascade FK to timelines, trigger_type CHECK constraint, composite timeline_id/created_at DESC index, and auth.uid()-scoped RLS coverage for all operations.
